arts.ttl: Revealed: The yellow card incident that has seen suspended Premier League referee David Coote caught up in ANOTHER scandal
arts.sum: Referee Coote is under investigation by the Football Association following allegations that he discussed showing a yellow card to a player prior to officiating in a game.

arts.ttl: David Beckham welcomes Lionel Messi's former Barcelona teammate as new Inter Miami head coach
arts.sum: Inter Miami appoint one of Lionel Messi's former Barcelona teammates as their new head coach following the recent departure of Tata Martino.

arts.ttl: Sporting Lisbon fans cause chaos with fireworks during Arsenal clash in Champions League - as they explode over David Raya's penalty area
arts.sum: The disgruntled home supporters launched the pyrotechnics after around 25 minutes with their side trailing 2-0 at the Estadio Jose Alvalade.

arts.ttl: Hibs 0 Aberdeen 0 LIVE as the Dons look to get title bid back on track while David Gray suffers
arts.sum: It's a huge night in Leith as both teams desperately need the points for very different reasons

arts.ttl: David Raya highlights Sporting CP's danger ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya has admitted one Sporting CP player in particular could cause problems for the Gunners in Champions League clash.

arts.ttl: David Squires on … Manchester City and a visit from exorcist Ian Holloway
arts.sum: Our cartoonist on how the Premier League champions may need a hand from Swindon’s paranormal investigator Buy a copy of a cartoon from our Print Shop David’s new book, Chaos in the Box: order it now Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Crysencio Summerville and David de Gea send messages to Aaron Wan-Bissaka after Newcastle 0-2 West Ham
Former Chelsea outcast shares his thoughts on his savage Blues snub - after ex-manager Mauricio Pochettino forgot who he was in a press conference amid Stamford Bridge exile
arts.sum: His time at the Blues was largely a disappointment, playing just 21 times for the club in a four-year spell which saw him have to go on loan to Porto and Monaco in search of game time.

arts.ttl: David Gray knows the Hibs sign that will spell real trouble as Easter Road boss adamant players are 'all in it together'
arts.sum: The Leith side can climb above rivals Hearts at the foot of the table if they hand Aberdeen a second successive defeat

arts.ttl: Mauricio Pochettino's 'hard line' with Tyler Adams could change the future of USMNT
arts.sum: That's a sign that we improved a lot and then we started to feel that we are a real group of people, that we are going to fight for something special," said Pochettino after the match, in a message of the demands he will have with his players to aspire to great things with USMNT . One of the players who has already realised the message his new coach is sending is Tyler Adams, who from the moment he arrived had an idea that his CV endorsed him, but in practice has seen that "he means business".
